items.reason: The new usage doc describes send/send_all return values but omits the timestamped audit log behavior required by specs/demo-notify.md.
The implementation plan covers per-recipient sends only and does not plan the timestamped audit log requirement added in the spec.
The new specification documents both per-recipient notification delivery and timestamped audit logging requirements.
